name: Down Under Ham n Cheese Supper Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix Bisquick, ham, onion, milk, eggs, oil, mustard, and 3/4 cup of the cheese in a bowl until combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased 10-inch pie pan.
4. Sprinkle the remaining cheese and sesame seeds evenly over the top.
5. Dot with butter.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and cut into wedges. Serve warm.
